src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Refactor HttpSecurity configuration to use the new Spring Security 6.x OAuth2 Authorization Server DSL, replacing the deprecated OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer and manual endpoint matching.
Remove the custom OidcUserInfo mapper bean and configuration, likely relying on default behavior or a different implementation strategy in the new version.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Removed Function<OidcUserInfoAuthenticationContext, OidcUserInfo> userInfoMapper and associated oidc.userInfoEndpoint configuration.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify HTTP authorization rules by removing specific permitAll/hasAuthority matchers in favor of a generic anyRequest().authenticated() rule within the authorization server context.
Configure the authentication entry point to redirect unauthenticated requests to the login page using the new exceptionHandling DSL.
Add @EnableWebSecurity annotation to the configuration class, which is required for Spring Security 6.x to properly initialize the security filter chain.
Replace the deprecated Ordered.HIGHEST_PRECEDENCE constant with an explicit integer value for the @Order annotation.
Define a new bean for RegisteredClientRepository using a custom implementation that likely integrates with the application's persistence layer.
Define a new bean for ClientRegistrationRepository, enabling OAuth2 client registration capabilities.
Replace manual SimpleCacheManager with Spring's dedicated CaffeineCacheManager to leverage built-in registration methods.
Explicitly disable null values in the cache manager to enforce stricter data integrity.
Add logic to skip expiration configuration for caches defined with a TTL of zero or less.
Update code indentation from tabs to spaces to align with modern Java coding standards.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to 4 spaces in method body.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with Spring Boot 3.5+ dependency changes.
Update JsonGenerator creation to use the new API method createGenerator on ObjectMapper instead of getFactory().createGenerator.
Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with Spring Boot 3.5+ dependency changes.
Update JsonGenerator creation to use the new API method available in the migrated Jackson version.
Replace legacy string-based charset encoding with StandardCharsets constant to remove checked exception handling.
Switch from string concatenation to parameterized logging for better performance and readability.
Capture and store client_id in login history for better audit trails.
Replace explicit cast after instanceof check with Java 16+ pattern matching for cleaner code.
Replace Apache Commons StringUtils.equalsIgnoreCase with Java 9+ Strings.CI.equals for case-insensitive comparison.
Remove manual null check for loadUserByUsername result, relying on Spring Security's contract that it throws exceptions instead of returning null.
Remove debug log statements for authentication failures, likely to reduce noise or rely on exception handling for logging.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Removed this.logger.debug("Authentication failed: no credentials provided");

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with Spring Boot 3.5+ dependency changes.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: import tools.jackson.core.JsonEncoding; import tools.jackson.core.JsonGenerator; import tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update JsonGenerator creation to use the new API method available in the migrated Jackson version.
Extract client_id from the saved request parameters to include it in the login history record.
Add clientId to the LoginHistory entity before saving.
Enhance login history remarks to include AJAX status and redirect URL for better debugging.
Move isAjax calculation earlier in the method to allow its value to be used in the login history remarks.
Remove redundant logger check before throwing an exception, relying on the exception message for context.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: throw new HttpMessageNotWritableException("Could not write JSON: " + ex.getMessage(), ex);

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Refactor Spring Security configuration to use the lambda DSL and method references introduced in Spring Security 5.7+/6.x, replacing the deprecated fluent API.
Explicitly define the security matcher for the filter chain to scope the security rules to specific paths, a requirement for proper multi-filter chain support in modern Spring Security.
Add explicit OAuth2 Login configuration to the security filter chain, likely to handle federated identity flows properly in the updated Spring Boot/Security version.
Add @Order annotation to the SecurityFilterChain bean to explicitly define its precedence relative to other potential security filter chains.
Remove the explicit AuthenticationProvider bean definition, likely because it is now auto-configured or handled differently in the updated Spring Security version.
Remove the manual injection and configuration of AuthenticationDetailsSource, as the new lambda DSL or default behavior handles authentication details differently.
Replace the generic customAuthenticationSuccessHandler with a specific FederatedIdentityAuthenticationSuccessHandler for OAuth2 login flows.
Migrate from a custom, manual captcha generation and verification logic to the 'tianai-captcha' library.
Refactor the controller to use Spring's `InitializingBean` for library initialization and standardize endpoint mappings.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Implemented `InitializingBean` to configure `TACBuilder` in `afterPropertiesSet` and consolidated `@RequestMapping`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the captcha generation endpoint to support multiple captcha types (slider, rotate, etc.) via the new library.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `/captcha/graph` to `/captcha/gen` and added logic to randomly select captcha types if 'RANDOM' is requested.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace the manual SMS/graph captcha verification logic with the library's matching API.
Remove the endpoint that manually streamed captcha images to the client, as the new library handles image resources differently.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted the `/captcha/graph/print` method and associated `HttpServletResponse` stream handling code.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove imports and fields related to the old custom captcha implementation and user account service.
Simplified pagination logic by replacing DataTables-specific parameters (draw, start, length) with standard offset/limit parameters.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed @RequestParam names from 'draw', 'start', 'length' to 'offset', 'limit' and updated calculation to `offset / limit + 1`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Added support for the 'clientAuthenticationMethods' field in OAuth2 client management.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Explicitly set ID to null when creating a new client to ensure it is treated as a new entity.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `object.setId(null);` before setting other fields in the creation block.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Explicitly set the response status to SUCCESS after successful create or update operations.
Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Spring MVC annotations to improve code clarity.

Remove captcha-related parameters from the sign-up endpoint method signature.
